title: Vertical Order traversal

	def verticalOrderTraversal(self, root):

hints: Use BFS (level order traversal) to ensure nodes at the same vertical level are ordered by depth.
Assign a vertical index to each node: root has index 0, left child has index-1, right child has index+1.
Use a hashmap to store nodes grouped by their vertical index.
Store (node, vertical_index) pairs in the queue during BFS.
After BFS, sort the hashmap keys and return the values in order from min to max vertical index.
BFS ensures that nodes at the same vertical level with lesser depth come first.
